summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent work; already-closed PRs are skipped as closed; refs missing from the compacted preflight need refreshed hydration before classification.
